goal: Synthesize the provided market notes into a compact competitive landscape brief for internal strategy discussion
scope: Use only the provided notes and links; do not add outside research unless requested later
constraints: Keep the brief under two pages

missing: Preferred geography focus if narrower than global

assumptions: Assume the audience is an internal strategy team
Assume a first-pass brief is acceptable before deeper validation
completion_definition: Done when a concise competitive brief is produced from the provided materials
fallback_if_blocked: If scope details are missing, produce a general brief and label the missing focus
